chunks.heading: Naming Functions
chunks.notes: Created source page javascriptallonge-naming-functions summarizing arrow functions, named function expressions, and hoisting. No other pages written. Key claims: arrow functions bind anonymous functions; function keyword with name creates internal name; named function expressions provide internal name for recursion; function declarations are hoisted. Entities touched: function, arrow function, named function expression, hoisting. Pages written: javascriptallonge-naming-functions.
